summary: Iteration 27: PMS Accounting Model - All tests passed. Backend: 13/13 tests (100%). Frontend: All 6 summary cards render correctly with proper data-testids, 'Realized Positions' section displays with correct PMS framing, no 'Capital Removed' text found.
passed_tests: GET /api/portfolios/overview returns total_realized_pnl, total_unrealized_pnl, nav_delta, total_pnl
Math invariant: aggregate total_pnl == total_realized_pnl + total_unrealized_pnl (diff=₹0.00)
Math invariant: per-portfolio total_pnl == realized_pnl + unrealized_pnl (within ₹1)
Math invariant: sum of portfolio totals == aggregate total_pnl
All 6 portfolios have healthy holdings (Bespoke=10, Quick=9, Value=7, Long=10, Swing=10, Alpha=10)
Portfolio weights sum close to 100% for all portfolios
POWERGRID.NS found in bespoke_forward_looking, quick_entry, value_stocks with RECONCILE conviction
XIRR endpoint works for all 6 portfolios
Big market overview returns 200 (SafeJSONResponse handles NaN/Inf)
Exit history returns data for value_stocks, bespoke_forward_looking, quick_entry
Frontend: 6 summary cards render (Total Capital 300L, NAV 310.4L, Realized P&L +0.00L, Unrealized P&L +11.04L, Total Return +11.04L +3.68%, Active 6/6)
Frontend: data-testids present: global-summary, global-realized-pnl, global-unrealized-pnl, global-total-return
Frontend: Table columns: STOCK, ENTRY, EXIT, BUY PX, EXIT PX, QTY, COST, PROCEEDS, REALIZED P&L, BOOKING
Frontend: No 'Capital Removed' text found (correct PMS framing)
Frontend: POWERGRID found in holdings table for Bespoke Forward Looking
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 6 AI portfolios with reconciled POWERGRID holdings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 verified the PMS accounting model implementation. Key findings: (1) GET /api/portfolios/overview returns proper PMS metrics: total_realized_pnl=0, total_unrealized_pnl=+₹11.04L, total_pnl=+₹11.04L (+3.68%), nav_delta=+₹10.4L. (2) Math invariants hold: total_pnl == realized + unrealized for both aggregate and per-portfolio. (3) All 6 portfolios have healthy holdings with weights summing ~100%. (4) POWERGRID.NS is in bespoke_forward_looking, quick_entry, value_stocks with conviction='RECONCILE' and rationale mentioning 'phantom capital' or 'auto-redeployment'. (5) Frontend /watchlist shows 6 summary cards with correct data-testids. (6) Portfolio detail pages show 'Realized Positions' section (not 'Capital Trail') with PMS-style metrics: Cost Basis Sold, Gross Proceeds, Realized P&L, Book Return %. (7) Table columns are: Entry, Exit, Buy Px, Exit Px, Qty, Cost, Proceeds, Realized P&L, Booking. (8) No 'Capital Removed' red text anywhere. (9) Regression: XIRR, custom_portfolios, big-market/overview all functional.
